subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down from the presence of the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, unto him who hath believed in the Truth and followed guidance in these days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل من لدی المهیمن القیوم الی الذی آمن بالحق و اتبع الهدی فی ایام
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @apocalyptic imagery, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God as sun, @suffering and imprisonment
